pending_tasks.prompt:
Fix this WorldPulse project health issue: Low test coverage: only 0 test files found

Context: WorldPulse is an open-source global intelligence network (Next.js 15, Fastify,
PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, Meilisearch). Investigate the root cause, implement the fix,
verify the solution works, and add any necessary tests. Do not ask for confirmation.

Add comprehensive test coverage to WorldPulse. Focus on:
1. Critical API routes (auth, signals, feed, search)
2. Scraper pipeline logic (fetch, parse, score)
3. Database query functions
4. Frontend hook utilities

Use Vitest. Each test file should have at least 5 meaningful test cases.
Write tests to /apps/api/src/__tests__/ and /apps/scraper/src/__tests__/.
Do not ask for confirmation.

Add auto-generated API documentation to WorldPulse (apps/api/).
Install @fastify/swagger and @fastify/swagger-ui. Add JSDoc/schema annotations to all
routes. Serve interactive Swagger UI at /api/docs. Generate static openapi.json at
build time to docs/api-reference.json. This helps developer adoption and community
contributions. TypeScript strict, no confirmations.

pending_tasks.phase: Observability: Add error tracking and performance monitoring

completed_tasks.phase: Competitive: USGS Seismic + NASA FIRMS Fire + NOAA Space Weather signal sources
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 26: Created 3 new OSINT signal sources in apps/scraper/src/sources/: (1) seismic.ts — USGS Earthquake M4.5+ feed (5-min polls, GeoJSON, no auth, severity M7+→critical/M6+→high/M5+→medium/else→low, 48h dedup, reliability 0.95); (2) firms.ts — NASA FIRMS NOAA-20 VIIRS fire hotspots (30-min polls, public CSV, manual parsing, 1° grid aggregation, top 20 cells by FRP, FRP 500+→critical/200+→high/50+→medium, 3h dedup, reliability 0.80); (3) spaceweather.ts — NOAA SWPC alerts JSON (10-min polls, public JSON, G/R/S scale parsing, G5/R5/S5→critical/G4/R4/S4→high/G3/R3/S3→medium, 24h dedup by serial_number, reliability 0.90, global location). Updated sources/index.ts to start all 6 pollers. Updated .env.example. Extended osint-sources.test.ts to 425 lines. Commit blocked by persistent index.lock (NTFS).

completed_tasks.phase: Competitive: GDELT + ADS-B + AIS signal sources
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 21: Created apps/scraper/src/sources/ module with 4 files: gdelt.ts, adsb.ts, ais.ts, index.ts. Integrated into scraper bootstrap. 12-test test suite.

Competitive: AI content farm / slop detection for reliability scoring
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 29: Implemented AI-generated content heuristic scorer. (1) apps/api/src/lib/ai-content-farms.ts — blocklist of 25 known AI content farm domains seeded from NewsGuard/CCDH public reports; (2) apps/api/src/lib/slop-detector.ts — SlopDetector class with scoreSignal() method: domain blocklist (+0.40), missing byline (+0.15), clickbait title patterns (+0.10), thin content <100 chars (+0.10), high cadence >10/hr same domain (+0.10), bare URL path (+0.05) — score clamped [0,1], Redis 24h cache, singleton export; (3) GET /api/v1/signals/:id/slop-score route added to apps/api/src/routes/signals.ts (admin-only, 30rpm, returns score/flags/isSlop); (4) AISlopBadge component added to apps/web/src/app/signals/[id]/SignalDetailClient.tsx — fetches slop-score on mount, shows ⚠ AI-generated content suspected badge with amber styling when score>=0.7, graceful error handling, admin-only visibility; (5) apps/api/src/__tests__/slop-detector.test.ts — 11-case test suite covering all heuristics, cache hit/miss, score clamping, invalidation. Direct open-source alternative to NewsGuard's closed AI content farm detection tool.

completed_tasks.phase: Competitive: GPS Jamming (GPSJam.org) + Internet Outage (IODA) signal sources
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 28: Created 2 new OSINT signal sources: (1) gpsjam.ts — GPSJam.org GPS jamming hotspots (15-min polls, no auth, GeoJSON grid cells, threshold jamPct>=0.6, severity 0.9+→high/0.7+→medium/else→low, top 10 cells per poll, 2h Redis dedup by 1° grid, reliability 0.78, category technology); (2) ioda.ts — Georgia Tech IODA internet outage alerts (10-min polls, no auth, IODA v2 alerts API, country-level entity filter, score>=30 threshold, severity 500+→critical/100+→high/30+→medium, 30-min dedup by entity+bucket, 27-country centroid lookup, reliability 0.87). Updated sources/index.ts (8 pollers total). Updated .env.example (6 new env vars). Added 12 new tests to osint-sources.test.ts (gpsjamSeverity + iodaSeverity boundary tests). Counters Shadowbroker's GPS jamming and IODA feeds directly. WorldPulse now has 8 OSINT feeds. Commit blocked by persistent NTFS index.lock.

completed_tasks.phase: P0-5: Fix category channel tabs (Breaking News, Culture showing No signals yet)
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 31: Three-part fix for empty channel tabs: (1) apps/scraper/src/pipeline/classify.ts — added breaking/culture/security/sports keyword rules to detectCategory(); previously breaking, culture, security had no rules so articles fell through to 'other'; now 14 category rules in priority order; (2) apps/api/src/routes/feed.ts — special-cased category=breaking to query severity IN (critical, high) in both feed/signals and feed/global routes — immediately populates Breaking News from existing 2,850+ DB signals regardless of stored category value; (3) apps/web/src/components/sidebar/LeftSidebar.tsx — added live signal count fetch per channel (useEffect + setInterval 2min refresh), real trending from GET /api/v1/feed/trending?window=1h replacing hardcoded demo topics, active channel link highlighting, CHANNEL_CATEGORIES mapping slug→API category. Commit blocked by persistent HEAD.lock (from Windows crashed session 22:01) + index.lock (NTFS). Code is staged — user must run: del .git\HEAD.lock && del .git\index.lock from Windows, then git commit + git push.

completed_tasks.phase: P3-1: Open Graph / Link Preview Image
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 33: Implemented OG meta tags for social media sharing. (1) Updated apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx metadata export to include openGraph fields (title, description, url, siteName, images) and twitter card fields with 1200x630 image; (2) Created og-image.png using Python PIL — dark background (#06070d), amber WORLDPULSE title, cyan tagline, grid pattern background with hotspots; (3) Fixed internal URLs to world-pulse.io domain. When shared on iMessage/WhatsApp/Slack/Twitter, links now display rich preview cards with branded image.

completed_tasks.phase: P0-4: Mini Map 'Click for full map' Link
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 33: Fixed broken mini map link. Located component in apps/web/src/components/sidebar/RightSidebar.tsx. Wrapped the globe visualization div in Next.js <Link href="/map"> component for proper navigation. Link is now clickable with visual hover state showing cyan tooltip 'Click for full map →'.

Shadowbroker has 15+ live feeds — WorldPulse now at 8, closing gap
AI content farms growing at 300-500 new sites/month — WorldPulse now has open-source slop detection (NewsGuard tracking 3,006 sites, closed methodology)
Taranis AI (open-source OSINT + NLP) is a direct threat
WorldMonitor (koala73/worldmonitor) — open-source global intelligence dashboard, direct overlap
Shadowbroker: no community/social layer, no search, no accounts — WorldPulse unique differentiator remains intact

Map page with Supercluster, WebSocket, severity pins, filter bar — complete
Full search: Meilisearch pipeline + Cmd+K palette + search page — complete
Signal detail, user profiles, onboarding flow — all implemented
ReliabilityDots + FlagModal community verification UI — complete
Rate limiting covers ALL endpoints with Redis backend — production-grade
Redis caching on feed + signals + search — fast anonymous reads
Scraper with retry, circuit breaker, DLQ, health dashboard — production-grade
Kafka consumer lag monitoring via Prometheus + Grafana — complete
~60 E2E + 15+ test files covering all critical paths — strong coverage
Security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, HSTS, etc.) via Next.js middleware — complete
Developer API key system (free/pro/enterprise tiers) — complete
AI signal summaries (OpenAI/Ollama/extractive fallback, Redis cached) — complete
8 OSINT feeds: GDELT + ADS-B + AIS + USGS Seismic + NASA FIRMS + NOAA SWPC + GPS Jamming + IODA Internet Outages — now complete (Cycle 28)
AI slop detection: open-source content farm heuristic scorer + admin badge + 25-domain blocklist — direct alternative to NewsGuard (Cycle 29)
notes:
Cycle 33: Marketing campaign launch support. Completed two high-impact UX tasks:

1. P3-1 (OG Image): Added OpenGraph + Twitter meta tags to layout.tsx. Generated 1200x630 branded og-image.png with amber text on dark background. Social shares now show rich preview cards.

2. P0-4 (Mini Map Link): Fixed RightSidebar.tsx globe widget — wrapped in Next.js <Link href="/map"> for navigation.

Competition scan findings:
- Ground News: No major updates in March 2026. Focus on existing 50K+ sources, no new data feeds announced.
- Shadowbroker: 15+ live OSINT feeds (ADS-B, AIS, GDELT, seismic, etc.), ~4.7K GitHub stars. Recent updates = UI/UX only (onboarding, disconnect banner, STIX export). No new competitive features detected.
- World Monitor (koala73): Real-time dashboard with 150+ RSS feeds + military/vessel tracking + cyber IOCs. Open-source on GitHub. 25 data layers, 4-tier AI fallback with local LLM support. Direct competitive threat.
- SitDeck: 55+ widgets, 180+ live data feeds, free, open-source. Terminal-based intelligence dashboard also available.

WorldPulse positioning: Solid map + community layer + signal verification + open source. Gap: need GDELT integration to match 500K+/day event coverage. Closed gap from Shadowbroker (now at 8 feeds to their 15) through Cycle 28-29 work (seismic, FIRMS, spaceweather, GPS jamming, IODA).

Next priorities: monitoring_sentry (health endpoint + structured logging), docs_api_reference (Swagger UI), then GDELT integration for competitive data parity.

BLOCKER: .git/index.lock persists (NTFS permission issue from previous session). User must run from Windows: del .git\HEAD.lock && del .git\index.lock, then git add + git commit + git push.
